channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cillian Murphy and Barry Keoghan Discuss Filming the Peaky Blinders Movie
item.description: The Peaky Blinders film, 'The Immortal Man', picks up six years after the series finale, set in 1940 Birmingham under the threat of Nazi bombing. Cillian Murphy reprises his role as Tommy Shelby, now ...

item.title: Technical Committee to Decide Policy on Day Senior Schools Amid Uncertainty
item.description: The future of day senior schools in Kenya hangs in balance as the Ministry of Education hands over key policy decisions to a technical committee. This comes amid ongoing transition to Competency-Based...

item.title: Halifax Council Orders Demolition of Two Illegal Storeys from Dartmouth Building
item.description: Halifax Regional Council has ordered a developer in Dartmouth, Nova Scotia, to dismantle the top two storeys of a residential building that were built without official approval. The building at 169 Wy...

item.title: SADC Calls for Stronger Regional Cooperation to Shield Economies from Global Crises
item.description: Minister of International Relations and Cooperation Ronald Lamola has emphasised the urgent need for Southern African countries to deepen regional cooperation in order to safeguard their economies aga...

item.title: Budget impact of negative gearing and capital gains tax concessions projected to double by 2035
item.description: New analysis from the Parliamentary Budget Office (PBO) shows that the cost to the Australian Budget from negative gearing and capital gains tax concessions for property investors is set to almost dou...

item.title: US Conducts Rescue Operation Following Military Aircraft Accident in Iraq
item.description: On Thursday, a US military refuelling aircraft, Boeing KC‑135 Stratotanker, crashed in western Iraq during an operational mission under Operation Epic Fury. The US Central Command confirmed that the i...

item.title: Opposition Moves to Remove Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar, Submits Notices in Parliament
item.description: In a significant political development, the opposition has formally submitted notices seeking the removal of Chief Election Commissioner (CEC) Gyanesh Kumar to the presiding officers of both Houses of...

item.title: Gurpreet Singh moved to special jail unit amid links to Toronto police corruption investigation
item.description: Gurpreet Singh, alleged drug smuggler associated with accused trafficking kingpin Ryan Wedding, has been transferred to a special handling unit at the Toronto South Detention Centre. The move occurred...

item.title: Ongoing Proceedings at the Madlanga Commission into Criminal Justice Corruption
item.description: The Madlanga Commission of Inquiry, formally known as the Commission of Inquiry into Criminality, Political Interference and Corruption in the Criminal Justice System, continues to hold hearings in So...

item.title: Lok Sabha adjourned over opposition protests on LPG price hike
item.description: On 13th March 2026, the Lok Sabha witnessed repeated adjournments due to persistent protests by opposition members concerning the surge in LPG prices, influenced by the ongoing West Asia crisis. The H...

item.title: Toronto's Eglinton LRT Opens, Offering a Boost to City Transit
item.description: The long-awaited Eglinton Crosstown Light-Rail Transit (LRT) line, known as Line 5, has finally opened in Toronto after decades of planning, delays, and cost overruns. The 19-kilometre line, running f...

item.title: Tenants Evicted After Ongoing Issues at Rutland Property
item.description: Two tenants have been evicted from a property on McCurdy Road in Rutland following months of disturbances and concerns raised by neighbours. Kelowna city councillor Mohini Singh, who owns a quarter of...

item.title: MSC to Develop 30-Hectare Container Terminal at Snake Island Port in Lagos
item.description: Na Mediterranean Shipping Company (MSC), wey be one of di biggest shipping lines for di world, don tanda 45-year sub-concession agreement with Nigerdock to run, develop, and maintain one exclusive con...

item.title: Majority of Filipino Adults Support Law to Limit Political Dynasties
item.description: According to a Pulse Asia survey conducted from February 27 to March 2, 2026, 64% of Filipino adults are in favor of passing the anti-political dynasty law, which aims to limit the influence of politi...

item.title: Kenyan Musician Overcomes Visa Challenges and Thrives in the USA
item.description: Gearrie Wainaina, a talented Kenyan saxophonist and MC, has shared his long and challenging journey to the USA. Back in 2010, he first attempted to get a US visa after being nominated for an award alo...

item.title: Porto Coach Praises Terem Moffi for Impressive Performance Against Stuttgart
item.description: FC Porto manager Francesco Farioli don give big props to Nigerian forward Terem Moffi after him solid show for the UEFA Europa League game against VfB Stuttgart wey Porto win 2–1. Moffi wey join Porto...

item.title: London Witness Used Smart Glasses to Receive Coaching During Court Testimony
item.description: During a London High Court trial concerning the directorship of a property development company, a witness named Laimonas Jakstys was discovered using smart glasses connected to his mobile phone to rec...

item.title: QuTwo develops AI platform to help enterprises transition toward quantum computing
item.description: Finnish entrepreneur Peter Sarlin, who previously sold his startup to AMD for $665 million, has launched two new ventures: NestAI, a physical AI lab, and QuTwo, an AI company preparing enterprises for...

item.title: EACC Chair Calls on Students and Citizens to Fight Corruption in Kenya
item.description: On 13 March 2026, the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) Chairperson, David Oginde, addressed students and leaders at Pan Africa Christian University during the Kenya Leadership Integrity Fo...

item.title: Nehal Hashmi appointed as Sindh Governor amid political concerns
item.description: In a sudden political development, PML-N leader Nehal Hashmi is set to take oath as the new governor of Sindh today in Karachi, with Sindh High Court Chief Justice Zafar Ahmed Rajput administering the...
